note: Archive hashes are provided in the external manifest because including exact archive hash inside the git archive is circular.

tests.external_quality_gates: pip-audit blocked_network due DNS; npm audit passed; pixi/mojo missing in runtime
tests.last_local_dashboard_quality: npm ci, npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate, npm run build all passed
tests.last_local_python_quality: ruff check, ruff format --check, basedpyright, pytest --cov --cov-fail-under=90, bandit, compileall, uv build all passed
